summary: Classified the ten job-listed PRs independently from the provided preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected; security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling, already-closed PRs are left closed, and the remaining open PRs are kept for normal maintainer/proof review rather than cleanup closure.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR with passing proof but maintainer review still required; no cleanup close action is appropriate.
Current useful i18n PR with distinct follow-up content from the already-merged earlier translation PR; leave open for maintainer review.
Already closed before this plan; no further mutation should be emitted.
Explicitly flagged by preflight as security-sensitive route-only.
Plausible narrow bug PR still needing real behavior proof; not a duplicate, low-signal close, or superseded cleanup target.
Explicitly flagged by preflight as security-sensitive route-only.
Maintainer-owned open PR with passing checks; keep for normal maintainer flow.
Plausible channel bug PR still needing real behavior proof; keep open rather than close.
Open docs PR appears to be waiting on author/draft flow; low-signal closeout is disabled by job permissions.
